name: Highlight Carousel
aesthetic: Editorial magazine (MKBHD-style). Full-bleed photo + oversized serif headline + italic accent word.

fonts.serif: Fraunces (900 weight for headlines, 400 italic for accents)
fonts.sans: Inter (600 for kicker/meta, uppercase, wide tracking)

slides.subject: Photo of menu board / menu page

copy.headline: N SPOTS (location count) OR neighbourhood name

slides.subject: Static — BiteMap logo + app store badges on dark bg
slides.copy: Fixed: 'find it on' / BiteMap logo / 'real places. real reviews. no fluff.'

copy_rules: Headline = ONE word, all caps, 6 letters or fewer
Accent = ONE word, lowercase italic, qualifies or expands the headline
Name the item literally — menu names > marketing adjectives
Restaurant name goes in kicker only
asset_rules: Professional/well-lit preferred — restaurant IG, Google Maps owner uploads, or food bloggers
NEVER AI-generated food imagery — kills credibility
All 4 photos must be from the SAME restaurant (no stock)
